messages.content:
What is the correct form of the verb in the following sentence: "She _____ to the store yesterday."
*
1 point
a) Go
b) Went
c) Going
d) Goes
b) Went

Which of the following is an example of a complex sentence?
*
1 point
a) She likes to read books.
b) He went to the store and bought some milk.
c) After she finished her homework, she went to bed.
d) The dog barked loudly at the mailman.
c) After she finished her homework, she went to bed.

Which of the following sentences contains a subject-verb agreement error?
*
1 point
a) The students in the class is taking the test.
b) The dog barks loudly every morning.
c) The team of players are practicing on the field.
d) The teacher grades the papers carefully.
a) The students in the class is taking the test.

Which of the following sentences contains a subject-verb agreement error?
*
1 point
a) The students in the class is taking the test.
b) The dog barks loudly every morning.
c) The team of players are practicing on the field.
d) The teacher grades the papers carefully.
a) The students in the class is taking the test.

Which of the following is a preposition?

*
1 point
a) Quickly
b) Above
c) Determined
d) Happiness
b) Above

Which of the following sentences contains a verb tense error?
*
1 point
a) I will finish my homework later tonight.
b) She has already seen that movie twice.
c) They were playing soccer at the park yesterday.
d) He will goes to the store after work.
d) He will goes to the store after work.

Shadow puppets ____ in China and ____ as far as Turkey and Greece today.    
*
1 point
A) will originate / have been spreading
B) are originating / will be spreading
C) originate / had spread
D) originated / have spread
E) will have originated / were spreading
D) originated / have spread

According to the new schedule, the whole team have accepted, we ____ every Monday and Wednesday next term, but I’m sure we ____ back to our normal routine of once a week before long.  
*
1 point
A) had trained / revert
B) train / have reverted
C) are training / reverted
D) are going to train / will revert
E) have been training / are reverting
D) are going to train / will revert

Which of the following sentences contains a punctuation error?
*
1 point
a) I can't wait to go on vacation, I need a break.
b) The sky was a beautiful shade of blue; it was a perfect day for a picnic.
c) John, who is my neighbor, is a great chef.
d) My favorite subjects are math, science, and English.
a) I can't wait to go on vacation, I need a break.

Which of the following sentences is written in the passive voice?
*
1 point
a) The cat chased the mouse.
b) The book was read by the student.
c) She painted the picture.
d) The teacher graded the test.
b) The book was read by the student.

Choose the correctly punctuated sentence:
*
1 point
a) I love to read, write, and draw.
b) I love to read, write and draw.
c) I love to read write, and draw.
d) I love to read write and draw.
a) I love to read, write, and draw.

Which of the following is an example of a preposition?
*
1 point
a) Walk
b) Running
c) Over
d) Quickly
c) Over

Which of the following words is a synonym for "happy"?
*
1 point
a) Sad
b) Angry
c) Joyful
d) Frustrated
c) Joyful
